message:
feat(ui): compact footer HUD format and updated search surface layout

Reworks the footer HUD line to use a compact "key value" format
separated by middle-dot (·) delimiters instead of the previous
"[key:value]" bracket notation. This reclaims ~3 characters per lane,
allowing more status information to fit in narrow terminal widths.

Changes to build_footer_hud_line:
- Separator changed from " [key:value]" to "key value" with " · "
  between lanes (first lane uses single space prefix)
- Width calculation updated to reflect the slimmer format
- Truncation logic adjusted for new separator costs

19 snapshot files updated to reflect the new rendering:
- Search surface snapshots: active_filters, breakpoint_medium/narrow/
  wide, structure_default, theme_dark/light/high_contrast
- Detail view snapshots: find_closed/current_match/empty_query/
  no_matches, tabs (json/messages/raw/snippets), pills, role_gutters

Also updates beads last-touched timestamp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
